Dataset Factory (expanded machine-readable documentation)
safety:
- not_investment_advice=true
- never infer missing values
- never emit buy/sell/target_price/recommendation
- preserve and surface data_gaps

allowed_dataset_ids: balance_sheet, block_trade_daily, bond_convertible_reference, broker_branch_reference, business_indicator_monthly, capital_formation_events, cash_flow, company_risk_events, convertible_bond_institutional_flow, day_trading_suspension, disposition_securities_period, dividends, esg_tesg, etf_holdings, fund_etf_metadata, income_statement, insider_director_holdings, institutional_flow, margin_short, market_index, market_overview_snapshots, monthly_revenue, options_daily_taifex, ownership_distribution, securities_lending, security_master, stock_delisting_lifecycle, stock_price_limit_daily, stock_split_par_value_events, taifex_institutional_flow, taifex_options_settlement_price, tax_business_registration, technical_indicators, total_margin_short_daily, valuation_core_daily, valuation_data, warrants_reference

[dataset:balance_sheet]
display_name=Balance Sheet
route_path=/v2/datasets/balance-sheet
status=production_baseline
production_ready=false
private_beta=true
preview=true
domain=fundamentals
category=financial_statement
source_family=official_mops
update_frequency=quarterly
freshness_policy=fixture_contract
coverage_start=2023Q2
coverage_end=2026Q1
row_count=12689
schema_fields:
- symbol:string
- fiscal_year:integer
- fiscal_quarter:integer
- total_assets:number
- total_liabilities:number
- total_equity:number
- cash_and_cash_equivalents:number
available_fields:
- symbol
- fiscal_period
- frequency
- total_assets
- total_liabilities
- total_equity
- cash_and_cash_equivalents
- inventory
- accounts_receivable
- accounts_payable
- source_name
known_gaps:
- unresolved_cross_source_allowlist:2882/2025/Q1
- unresolved_cross_source_allowlist:2882/2025/Q2
- unresolved_cross_source_allowlist:2882/2025/Q3
- unresolved_cross_source_allowlist:2882/2025/Q4
- sparse_nulls:total_assets=264
- sparse_nulls:total_liabilities=264
- mostly_null_by_contract:cash_and_cash_equivalents
- coverage_limited_to_verified_window:2023Q2..2026Q1
usage_example:
- GET /v2/datasets/balance-sheet?limit=3

[dataset:block_trade_daily]
display_name=鉅額交易日資料 / Block Trade Daily
route_path=/v2/datasets/block-trade-daily
status=private_beta
production_ready=false
private_beta=true
preview=true
domain=chip_deep
category=market_structure_reference
source_family=official_twse_block_trade_monthly
update_frequency=bounded_verified_daily_aggregation_set
freshness_policy=fixture_contract
coverage_start=2022-01-04
coverage_end=2026-06-05
row_count=4276
schema_fields:
- trade_date:date
- market:string
- trading_classification:string
- trade_type:string
- trade_volume:number
- trade_volume_market_share_pct:number
- trade_value:number
- trade_value_market_share_pct:number
- source_provider:string
- source_role:string
- source_family:string
- lineage:json
- data_gaps:json
available_fields:
- trade_date
- market
- trading_classification
- trade_type
- trade_volume
- trade_volume_market_share_pct
- trade_value
- trade_value_market_share_pct
- source_provider
- source_role
- source_family
- lineage
- data_gaps
known_gaps:
- twse_only_scope
- summary_level_only
- no_tpex_coverage
- no_ordinary_ohlc_payload
- not_broker_branch_trading
- not_individual_trade_tape
- parser_date_shape_protections_enabled
- not_investment_advice
usage_example:
- GET /v2/datasets/block-trade-daily?limit=3

[dataset:bond_convertible_reference]
display_name=可轉換公司債基本資料
route_path=/v2/datasets/bond-convertible-reference
status=private_beta
production_ready=false
private_beta=true
preview=true
domain=reference
category=bond_convertible_reference
source_family=official_twse_tpex_convertible_bond_reference
update_frequency=latest_snapshot_only
freshness_policy=fixture_contract
coverage_start=2026-06-05
coverage_end=2026-06-05
row_count=1474
schema_fields:
- data_gap:schema_not_declared
available_fields:
- bond_code
- bond_name
- issuer_ticker
- issuer_name
- market
- issue_date
- maturity_date
- conversion_price
- conversion_ratio
- outstanding_principal
- source_provider
- source_role
- lineage
- data_gaps
known_gaps:
- latest_snapshot_only
- clean_bondcode_reference_only
- blank_or_placeholder_bondcode_rows_excluded=837
- ambiguous_duplicate_bondcode_group_excluded=B85205
- not_bond_price_history
- not_yield_curve_or_credit_analytics
- not_full_bond_universe_claim
- not_investment_advice
usage_example:
- GET /v2/datasets/bond-convertible-reference?limit=3

preview=true
domain=identity
category=broker_branch_reference
source_family=official_twse_broker_branch_reference
update_frequency=source_dependent_daily
freshness_policy=fixture_contract
coverage_start=2026-06-08
coverage_end=2026-06-08
row_count=811
schema_fields:
- parent_broker_code:string
- parent_broker_name:string
- branch_code:string
- branch_name:string
- market:string
- address:string
- source_provider:string
- source_role:string
- source_family:string
- source_lineage:json
- data_gaps:json
available_fields:
- parent_broker_code
- parent_broker_name
- branch_code
- branch_name
- market
- address
- source_provider
- source_role
- source_family
- source_lineage
- data_gaps
known_gaps:
- reference_only_snapshot
- current_snapshot_only
- not_trading_activity_coverage
- not_broker_branch_trading_daily
- not_bare_broker_count_claim
- address_missing_rows=17
- not_investment_advice
usage_example:
- GET /v2/datasets/broker-branch-reference?limit=3

- source_family:string

- indicator_month

- source_family

coverage_end=2026-06-29

- market:string

- event_type:string
- effective_date:date
- ratio_value:number
- price_per_share:number
- source_event_ref:string
- source_provider:string
- source_role:string
- source_family:string
- lineage:json
- data_gaps:json

- ticker
- market
- event_date
- event_type
- effective_date
- ratio_value
- price_per_share
- source_event_ref
- source_provider
- source_role
- source_family
- lineage

- no_tpex_decap_coverage
- no_dividend_distribution_coverage
- no_ex_right_ex_dividend_coverage

[dataset:cash_flow]
display_name=Cash Flow Statement
route_path=/v2/datasets/cash-flow
status=production_baseline
production_ready=false
private_beta=true
preview=true
domain=fundamentals
category=financial_statement
source_family=official_mops
update_frequency=quarterly
freshness_policy=fixture_contract
coverage_start=2023Q2
coverage_end=2026Q1
row_count=12685
schema_fields:
- symbol:string
- fiscal_year:integer
- fiscal_quarter:integer
- operating_cash_flow:number
- investing_cash_flow:number
- financing_cash_flow:number
- free_cash_flow:number
available_fields:
- symbol
- fiscal_period
- frequency
- operating_cash_flow
- investing_cash_flow
- financing_cash_flow
- free_cash_flow
- source
known_gaps:
- deferred_null_by_contract:free_cash_flow
- sparse_nulls:financing_cash_flow=25
- column_absent_by_contract:net_cash_flow
- coverage_limited_to_verified_window:2023Q2..2026Q1
usage_example:
- GET /v2/datasets/cash-flow?limit=3

- market:string

- event_type:string
- event_subtype:string

- summary:string
- penalty_amount:number

- source_role:string
- source_family:string

- data_gaps:json

- market
- event_date

- source_role

display_name=Dividends
route_path=/v2/datasets/dividends
status=trusted_current_snapshot_only
production_ready=false
private_beta=true
preview=true
domain=market_structure
category=market_structure_corporate_actions
source_family=official_twse_dividend_distribution_current_snapshot

freshness_policy=fixture_contract
coverage_start=2026-06-03
coverage_end=2026-06-03
row_count=1135
schema_fields:
- ticker:string
- market:string
- announcement_date:date
- source_event_ref:string
- cash_dividend:number
- stock_dividend:number
- ex_dividend_date:date
- ex_rights_date:date
- record_date:date
- payment_date:date
- dividend_type:string
- fiscal_period:string
- event_status:string
- provider:string
- source_role:string
- lineage:json
available_fields:
- ticker
- market
- announcement_date
- source_event_ref
- cash_dividend
- stock_dividend
- ex_dividend_date
- ex_rights_date
- record_date
- payment_date
- dividend_type
- fiscal_period
- event_status
- provider
- source_role
- lineage
known_gaps:
- current_snapshot_only_no_historical_2020_2026_claim
- tpex_not_integrated
- delisted_not_covered
- rename_ticker_change_not_covered
- dividend_events_ex_dividend_date_auxiliary_field
- authoritative_ex_date_in_ex_dividend_results
- security_master_gaps_preferred_special_variants=32
- adjusted_price_not_supported
- total_return_not_supported
usage_example:
- GET /v2/datasets/dividends?limit=3

display_name=ETF 持股明細
route_path=/v2/datasets/etf-holdings
status=private_beta
production_ready=false
private_beta=true
preview=true
domain=reference
category=etf_holdings
source_family=fubon_etf_assets_page
update_frequency=latest_snapshot_only
freshness_policy=fixture_contract
coverage_start=2026-06-04
coverage_end=2026-06-05
row_count=9375
schema_fields:
- etf_code:string
- etf_name:string
- market:string
- issuer:string
- as_of_date:date
- holding_ticker:string
- holding_name:string
- holding_market:string
- holding_weight:number
- holding_units:number
- source_provider:string
- source_role:string
- source_family:string
- lineage:json
- data_gaps:json
available_fields:
- etf_code
- etf_name
- market
- issuer
- as_of_date
- holding_ticker
- holding_name
- holding_market
- holding_weight
- holding_units
- source_provider
- source_role
- source_family
- lineage
- data_gaps
known_gaps:
- latest_available_snapshot_only
- issuer_limited_fubon_only
- approved_etf_scope_only=fubon_page_discovered_50_etfs
- mixed_source_as_of_dates=2026-06-04,2026-06-05
- holding_market_nullable_when_not_source_provided
- no_market_wide_etf_holdings
- no_historical_holdings
- no_non_fubon_issuer_coverage
- not_fund_etf_metadata
- not_index_constituents
- not_etf_price_or_performance
usage_example:
- GET /v2/datasets/etf-holdings?limit=3

display_name=Income Statement

private_beta=true
preview=true

category=financial_statement
source_family=official_mops
update_frequency=quarterly
freshness_policy=fixture_contract

coverage_end=2026Q1
row_count=12268
schema_fields:
- symbol:string
- fiscal_year:integer
- fiscal_quarter:integer
- revenue:number
- gross_profit:number
- operating_income:number
- net_income:number
- eps:number

- symbol
- fiscal_period
- frequency
- period_end_date
- report_date
- period_type
- fiscal_year
- fiscal_quarter
- revenue
- gross_profit
- operating_income
- pretax_income
- net_income
- eps
- source

- sparse_nulls:revenue=10
- sparse_nulls:gross_profit=4
- sparse_nulls:operating_income=3
- coverage_limited_to_verified_window:2023Q2..2026Q1

- GET /v2/datasets/income-statement?limit=3

[dataset:insider_director_holdings]
display_name=董監與內部人持股資料
route_path=/v2/datasets/insider-director-holdings
status=private_beta
production_ready=false
private_beta=true
preview=true
domain=reference
category=governance_holdings
source_family=official_twse_tpex_insider_director_balance_snapshot
update_frequency=latest_balance_snapshot_only
freshness_policy=fixture_contract
coverage_start=2026-05-20
coverage_end=2026-05-20
row_count=43544
schema_fields:
- ticker:string
- market:string
- source_as_of_date:date
- holder_name:string
- holder_role:string
- holder_category:string
- holding_shares:number
- holding_ratio:number
- pledge_shares:number
- source_provider:string
- source_role:string
- source_family:string
- source_row_key:string
- lineage:json
- data_gaps:json
available_fields:
- ticker
- market
- source_as_of_date
- holder_name
- holder_role
- holder_category
- holding_shares
- holding_ratio
- pledge_shares
- source_provider
- source_role
- source_family
- source_row_key
- lineage
- data_gaps
known_gaps:
- latest_balance_snapshot_only
- transfer_event_family_excluded_from_v1
- holding_ratio_nullable_by_policy
- excluded_non_exact_official_conflict_source_row_key=TWSE|2026-05-20|2412|副總經理本人|陳淑玲
- excluded_non_exact_conflict_rows=2
- not_full_person_identity_graph
- no_historical_transaction_reconstruction
- not_investment_advice
usage_example:
- GET /v2/datasets/insider-director-holdings?limit=3

- book_value_per_share
- pe
- pb
- dividend_per_share_ttm
- dividend_yield
- source_summary
- notes
known_gaps:
- coverage_limited_to_seeded_window:2023-06-01..2026-05-28
- raw_payload_excluded_from_public_route
- not_investment_advice
usage_example:
- GET /v2/datasets/valuation-core-daily?limit=3

[dataset:valuation_data]
display_name=Valuation Data
route_path=/v2/datasets/valuation-data
status=production_baseline
production_ready=false
private_beta=false
preview=false
domain=fundamentals
category=valuation
source_family=official_mops_twse
update_frequency=daily
freshness_policy=fixture_contract
coverage_start=2023-06-01
coverage_end=2026-05-15
row_count=731820
schema_fields:
- symbol:string
- as_of_date:date
- pe_ratio:number
- pb_ratio:number
available_fields:
- symbol
- as_of_date
- pe_ratio
- pb_ratio
- earnings_yield
- book_to_price
- dividend_yield
- market_cap
- shares_outstanding
- provider
- source_role
- lineage
known_gaps:
- broader_derived_facts_surface
- distinct_from_valuation_core_daily_anchor
- not_investment_advice
usage_example:
- GET /v2/datasets/valuation-data?limit=3

[dataset:warrants_reference]
display_name=權證基本資料
route_path=/v2/datasets/warrants-reference
status=private_beta
production_ready=false
private_beta=true
preview=true
domain=reference
category=security_reference
source_family=official_twse_tpex_warrants_reference
update_frequency=latest_snapshot_only
freshness_policy=fixture_contract
coverage_start=2026-06-05
coverage_end=2026-06-05
row_count=51570
schema_fields:
- warrant_code:string
- market:string
- underlying_ticker:string
- issuer:string
- call_put:string
- strike_price:number
- maturity_date:date
- source_provider:string
- source_role:string
- lineage:json
- data_gaps:json
available_fields:
- warrant_code
- market
- underlying_ticker
- issuer
- call_put
- strike_price
- maturity_date
- source_provider
- source_role
- lineage
- data_gaps
known_gaps:
- latest_snapshot_only
- issuer_nullable_when_not_source_provided
- no_historical_issue_archive_claim
- no_daily_quote_coverage
- no_lifecycle_completeness_claim
- not_investment_advice
usage_example:
- GET /v2/datasets/warrants-reference?limit=3
